action_taken: Replaced lubricant oil with EconoLube Standard 320 per cost reduction initiative. Checked alignment and vibration levels within spec.
Chemical cleaning performed on tube bundle. Efficiency restored to 95% of design.

problem_description: Minor seal leak detected during rounds
action_taken: Replaced mechanical seal. Investigation noted seal faces showed unusual wear pattern. Pump returned to service.
Retorqued foundation bolts. Vibration levels returned to normal operating range.
Replaced valve trim and seat. Tested shutoff - passed.
Internal inspection completed. No significant findings. Next inspection due 2025.
Topped up bearing oil. Temperature returned to normal. Scheduled bearing replacement for next turnaround.
Cleaned fan blades. Balanced and tested. Motor running within rated amps.
Cleaned and inspected all burner tips. Flame pattern restored to specification.

problem_description: Lubricant oil change per PM schedule
action_taken: Changed lubricant to EconoLube Standard 320. Oil analysis of drained sample showed normal wear metals.
Gamma scan performed. Results indicate tray 18-22 may have fouling. Scheduled for turnaround cleaning.

problem_description: Annual PSV testing for V-310 overpressure protection
action_taken: PSV tested and certified. Set pressure verified at 13.2 bar. Resealed and tagged. PSV protects V-310 overhead drum.
Emergency seal replacement performed. Root cause suspected to be lubricant incompatibility but not confirmed. Pump critical - returned to service urgently.
Plugged leaking tubes (3 total). Exchanger returned to service at reduced capacity. Replacement tubes on order.

problem_description: Valve plate failure - loss of compression
action_taken: Replaced valve plates on cylinders 1 and 2. Compressor tested and returned to service.
Replaced level transmitter. Calibrated and verified against manual dip measurement.
Changed lubricant oil. Used EconoLube Standard 320 per stores availability. Noted this is third consecutive use of this lubricant grade.
Recalibrated valve positioner. Full stroke test passed.
Performed steam-air decoking. Tube skin temperatures returned to acceptable range.

problem_description: Major seal leak - significant hydrocarbon release
action_taken: Emergency shutdown and seal replacement. Seal autopsy revealed elastomer degradation consistent with chemical attack. Lubricant sample sent for analysis.
Isolated affected section. Temporary repair with epoxy compound. Permanent replacement scheduled.
Replaced packing rings. Adjusted packing gland. Leak test passed.
Realigned pump-motor coupling using laser alignment. Within tolerance.
Cleaned trays 18-42. Replaced damaged bubble caps on trays 20 and 21. Column reassembled and tested.
Replaced seal. Bearing housing flushed and refilled with VantaLube Premium 320. Fourth failure since 2023 - formal RCA required per VP-MNT-012.

problem_description: Routine external inspection and insulation check
action_taken: Visual inspection of V-310 overhead drum completed. Insulation appears intact. No obvious damage. Thickness survey scheduled for August 2023.
